sentences.arabic: النِّيَّةُ الصَّالِحَةُ هِيَ أَسَاسُ كَبِيرٌ لِكُلِّ عَمَلٍ فِي دِينِنَا.
sentences.translation: Iskrena namjera je veliki temelj za svako djelo u našoj vjeri.
sentences.translationEn: Sincere intention is a major foundation for every deed in our religion.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، حَدِيثٌ رَقْمُ ١].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave, hadis br. 1].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'Actions are but by intentions' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Revelation, Hadith No. 1].

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ اللهَ تَعَالَى يَنْظُرُ إِلَى مَا فِي قُلُوبِنَا قَبْلَ أَفْعَالِنَا الظَّاهِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da Uzvišeni Allah gleda u ono što je u našim srcima prije naših vanjskih djela.
sentences.translationEn: This means that Allah the Almighty looks at what is in our hearts before our outward actions.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا كَانَ عَمَلُكَ خَالِصًا لِوَجْهِ اللهِ، فَسَوْفَ تَنَالُ الْأَجْرَ الْعَظِيمَ.
sentences.translation: Ako je tvoje djelo iskreno radi Allaha, dobit ćeš veliku nagradu.
sentences.translationEn: If your deed is sincerely for the sake of Allah, you will receive a great reward.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ أَنْ يُصَحِّحَ نِيَّتَهُ قَبْلَ بَدْءِ أَيِّ عِبَادَةٍ أَوْ خَيْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Zato svaki musliman mora popraviti svoju namjeru prije početka bilo kojeg ibadeta ili dobrog djela.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, every Muslim must correct their intention before starting any act of worship or goodness.
